description: UVM verification environment for an AXI4 DUT showing proper UVM methodology. The agent encapsulates driver, monitor and sequencer. The driver and monitor connect to the DUT via a virtual interface (axi4_vif). Sequences generate items via TLM to the sequencer, which forwards to the driver. The monitor broadcasts observed transactions via TLM analysis port to the scoreboard. TLM ports bypass their parent hierarchy blocks.

testbench.description: Top-level UVM testbench module. Instantiates the DUT and connects the UVM environment via virtual interfaces.

global_signals.name: clk
global_signals.description: System clock driven by the testbench.

instances.description: Top-level UVM test — configures the environment and starts sequences
UVM environment — the bigger box containing agents, scoreboards and sequences
AXI4 UVM agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor
AXI4 sequencer — inside the agent, arbitrates sequence items
AXI4 driver — inside the agent, drives RTL via virtual interface handle
AXI4 monitor — inside the agent, observes RTL via virtual interface handle
AXI4 virtual interface — connects driver/monitor to the RTL DUT signals
UVM sequence — generates stimulus, connects to sequencer via TLM port
TLM analysis FIFO — buffers transactions from monitor to scoreboard
UVM scoreboard — receives and checks transactions via TLM analysis port

connections.description: System clock from testbench to all UVM components
Active-low reset from testbench to all UVM components

connections.label: uvm_test → env
connections.description: UVM test creates and configures the environment

connections.label: env → agent
connections.description: Environment creates and contains the AXI4 agent

connections.label: agent → sequencer
connections.description: Agent creates and encapsulates the sequencer

connections.label: agent → driver
connections.description: Agent creates and encapsulates the driver

connections.label: agent → monitor
connections.description: Agent creates and encapsulates the monitor

connections.label: env → scoreboard
connections.description: Environment creates and contains the scoreboard

connections.label: env → sequence
connections.description: Environment creates and contains the sequence

connections.label: seq → sequencer (TLM)
connections.description: Sequence sends generated items to the sequencer via TLM seq_item_port. This TLM connection bypasses the agent boundary.

connections.label: seq_item_port
connections.description: TLM seq_item_port: Sequencer delivers sequence items to the driver. The driver calls get_next_item() / item_done() on this port.

connections.label: driver → vif
connections.description: Driver gets a handle to the virtual interface and drives AXI4 signals onto the DUT through it.

connections.label: vif → monitor
connections.description: Monitor gets a handle to the virtual interface and observes AXI4 signals from the DUT through it.

connections.label: analysis_port → FIFO
connections.description: Monitor broadcasts observed transactions to the TLM analysis FIFO via its analysis port. This TLM connection bypasses the agent boundary.

connections.label: FIFO → scoreboard
connections.description: TLM analysis FIFO provides buffered transactions to the scoreboard for checking.
